text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The major goal for the Mejiro family, the spring
Tenno Sho, is here. Overwhelmed by the intensity
of everyone around her, Mejiro Palmer is unable
to get into the party mood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although the stress gets to her and she shrinks
under the pressure, the race must go on.
